ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the week */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week */,
  "ndvi_ne" REAL /* NDVI value for the northeast region */,
  "ndvi_nw" REAL /* NDVI value for the northwest region */,
  "ndvi_se" REAL /* NDVI value for the southeast region */,
  "ndvi_sw" REAL /* NDVI value for the southwest region */,
  "dew_point_temp_k" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Kelvin */,
  "precipitation_kg_per_m2" REAL /* Precipitation amount in kg per m2 */,
  "relative_humidity_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity in percent */,
  "specific_humidity_g_per_kg" REAL /* Specific humidity in g per kg */,
  "avg_temp_c" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "diurnal_temp_rng_c" REAL /* Diurnal temperature range in Celsius */,
  "max_temp_c" REAL /* Maximum temperature in Celsius */,
  "min_temp_c" REAL /* Minimum temperature in Celsius */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Total precipitation in millimeters */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air Quality Index (AQI) */,
  "so2_ppm" REAL /* Sulfur dioxide concentration in parts per million */,
  "no2_ppm" REAL /* Nitrogen dioxide concentration in parts per million */,
  "o3_ppm" REAL /* Ozone concentration in parts per million */,
  "co_ppm" REAL /* Carbon monoxide concentration in parts per million */,
  "pm10_ug_per_m3" REAL /* PM10 particulate matter concentration in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm2_5_ug_per_m3" REAL /* PM2.5 particulate matter concentration in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the week */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of disease cases reported */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease being reported */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations due to the disease */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to the disease */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Detailed summary of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
